notes: Fix: Valheim Data + Cart pages crashed with React #185 ('Maximum update depth exceeded') the moment they rendered. ExportToListModal subscribed to the MegaList store with an inline `.filter()` selector, returning a fresh array reference every snapshot — React 18's getSnapshot identity check tripped on it. The selector now reads the raw lists array and filters via useMemo. Pairs with v1.10.21's ErrorBoundary, which surfaced this stack from megaload.log.
